errors.STOCK_NO_RECORD_IN_WAREHOUSE: Cannot reserve stock: this resource has no stock record in the order's warehouse. Requested: {{requested}}. Resource id: {{resourceId}}, warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.STOCK_INSUFFICIENT_RESERVE: Cannot reserve stock. Requested: {{requested}}, available in this warehouse (physical stock minus existing reservations): {{available}}. Resource id: {{resourceId}}, warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.STOCK_DUPLICATE: Stock already exists for resource id {{resourceId}} in warehouse id {{warehouseId}}. Use adjust instead.
errors.STOCK_INSUFFICIENT_ADJUST: Insufficient stock. Available: {{available}}, requested reduction: {{requested}}. Stock id: {{stockId}}
errors.STOCK_DELETE_HAS_MOVEMENTS: Cannot delete stock with movement history: the audit trail is append-only. Adjust the quantity to zero instead. Stock id: {{stockId}}
errors.WAREHOUSE_DELETE_HAS_STOCK: Cannot delete warehouse with existing stock. Warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.WAREHOUSE_DELETE_HAS_ORDERS: Cannot delete warehouse with existing orders. Warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.WAREHOUSE_DELETE_HAS_SHIPMENTS: Cannot delete warehouse with existing shipments. Warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.RESOURCE_DELETE_HAS_STOCK: Cannot delete resource with existing stock. Resource id: {{resourceId}}
errors.RESOURCE_DELETE_REFERENCED: Cannot delete resource referenced by order items. Resource id: {{resourceId}}
errors.UNIT_DELETE_HAS_ORDERS: Cannot delete unit with existing orders. Unit id: {{unitId}}
errors.VEHICLE_DELETE_HAS_SHIPMENTS: Cannot delete vehicle with existing shipments. Vehicle id: {{vehicleId}}
errors.ORDER_DELETE_COMPLETED: Cannot delete a COMPLETED order: its stock movements are part of the audit trail. Order id: {{orderId}}
errors.ORDER_DELETE_HAS_DELIVERED_SHIPMENT: Cannot delete an order with a DELIVERED shipment: its stock movements are part of the audit trail. Order id: {{orderId}}
errors.ORDER_DELETE_HAS_SHIPMENTS: Cannot delete an order with existing shipments. Delete its shipments first. Order id: {{orderId}}
errors.USER_LAST_ADMIN_REMOVE: You can't remove the last enabled ADMIN user.
errors.USER_LAST_ADMIN_DISABLE: You can't disable the last enabled ADMIN user.

login.title: MOLS

login.adminCreated: Administrator account created — sign in to continue.
login.lostAccessHint: Can't sign in? Contact your system administrator to reset your access.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadError: The dashboard could not be loaded. Please try again.

map.title: Logistics map
map.loadError: The map could not be loaded. Please try again.
map.emptyDescription: No warehouses or units have coordinates yet. Add latitude/longitude from their edit forms to see them here.

form.nameLength: Warehouse name must be between 2 and 100 characters
form.locationLength: Warehouse location must be between 2 and 200 characters

form.nameLength: Resource name must be between 2 and 100 characters
form.typeLength: Resource type must be between 2 and 50 characters

form.capacityPositive: Vehicle capacity must be greater than 0

form.nameLength: Unit name must be between 2 and 100 characters
form.locationLength: Unit location must be between 2 and 200 characters

stocks.title: Stock
stocks.hint: Use Adjust to change a quantity — it always keeps the movement audit trail intact.

create.quantityNonNegative: Stock quantity must be zero or greater

adjustPage.title: Adjust stock
adjustPage.hint: Every change is recorded in the audit log (movement history). Decreases cannot go below zero.

orders.title: Orders
orders.movementsHint: Only movements explicitly linked to this order are shown.

edit.title: Edit order #{{id}}
edit.fixedAtCreation: Fixed at creation — every item reserves stock from this warehouse.
edit.statusLockedCompleted: This order is completed — its status can no longer change.
edit.statusLockedCancelled: This order is cancelled — its status can no longer change.

itemsManager.lockedHint: This order is completed or cancelled — items can no longer be changed.
itemsManager.removeMessage: This removes the item from the order.
itemsManager.quantityPositive: Order item quantity must be greater than 0

wizard.title: New order
wizard.shipmentCreateFailed: Order created, but the shipment could not be created: {{message}}

header.warehouseHint: Fixed for the whole order — every item reserves stock from this warehouse, and the shipment inherits it automatically.

items.availabilityWarning: Warning: only {{available}} unit(s) of {{name}} are still unreserved in this order's warehouse. You can still add this item, but creating the order may fail.
items.addAtLeastOne: Add at least one item to continue.
items.quantityPositive: Order item quantity must be greater than 0

shipment.createNow: Create a shipment for this order now
shipment.shipNowHint: Defaults to shipping everything now; lower a quantity to leave the rest for a later shipment.

form.originWarehouseHint: Fixed to the selected order's warehouse.
form.orderNoItems: This order has no items yet.
form.selectAtLeastOneItem: Select at least one item to ship.
form.deliveredHint: Transitioning to Delivered deducts stock from the origin warehouse for this shipment's own items and records the movements — it will be rejected if stock is insufficient.

detail.movementsHint: Only movements explicitly linked to this shipment are shown.

form.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
form.passwordLength: Password must be between 12 and 128 characters
